name: Projects nav link navigates to the full projects listing page
description: Clicking Projects in the sidebar navigation goes to /projects and lists all five portfolio projects.

planSteps.description: Click the 'Projects' link in the sidebar navigation
Verify the browser navigates to the /projects page showing an 'All Projects' heading
Verify the page lists five project entries titled EduHear, Washington State Library, China Telecom, Dubloo, and Healthcare Disparities Analysis, each with a visible technology tag list
